creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #2)
> Those pseudo-slave ports really are a pain when it comes to any larger changes in the tree. :-(
Agree.
You can keep "PORTREVISION=" lines in slave ports, but set value to 6. This is more obvious than "PORTREVISION?=  6" in multimedia/avidemux/Makefile.common.
